title: Forgot Password 忘记密码
scene: 用户忘记密码，寻求客服帮助

lines.speaker: User
lines.line: Hi, I forgot my password and I cannot log in. Can you help me?
lines.trans: 你好，我忘记密码了，登不上。你能帮我吗？

lines.speaker: Support
lines.line: Of course. Do you still have access to the email linked to your account?
lines.trans: 当然。您还能访问账号绑定的邮箱吗？

lines.speaker: User
lines.line: Yes, I do. I can open my email app.
lines.trans: 是的，可以。我能打开邮箱APP。

lines.speaker: Support
lines.line: Great. Please click "Forgot Password" on the login page and enter your email.
lines.trans: 很好。请在登录页面点击"忘记密码"，然后输入您的邮箱。

lines.speaker: User
lines.line: I did that. Now I am waiting for the reset link.
lines.trans: 我点了。现在我在等重置链接。

lines.speaker: Support
lines.line: Please check your inbox and spam folder. The email should arrive in two minutes.
lines.trans: 请查看收件箱和垃圾邮件文件夹。邮件应该在两分钟内到达。

lines.speaker: User
lines.line: I found it in the spam folder. I clicked the link. Now it asks for a new password.
lines.trans: 我在垃圾邮件里找到了。我点了链接。现在让我输入新密码。

lines.speaker: Support
lines.line: Perfect. Please create a strong password that you have not used before.
lines.trans: 很好。请设置一个您之前未使用过的强密码。

lines.speaker: User
lines.line: I set a new one. I just logged in successfully. Thank you!
lines.trans: 我设置好了。刚刚成功登录了。谢谢！

lines.speaker: Support
lines.line: You are welcome. For security, please enable two-factor authentication next time.
lines.trans: 不客气。为了安全，下次请开启双重验证。
